change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API

en.value: Distribution of WASH, Food, non-food, and shelter items (Tents, food items, WASH items, Bed sheets, blankets etc.)Form/reform farmers’ groupsStudy on traditional/indigenous knowledge and skill on farming and Natural Resource Management (NRM) to promote such practicesSupport (seeds, equipment/materials, tools, etc.)  and train men/women and youth on vocational skills, IGAS, non-farm and off-farm agricultural practices, microenterprise development, value chain, and entrepreneurshipSupport materials (post harvesting tools, seeds, tools and machines, etc.) to men/women and youthProvide training and materials to women/ groups and youth on regenerative farming/permaculture principle and practices and establish model farmsConduct and support to establish farmer’s field schoolsSupport the efficient climate resilient technologies (drip irrigation, sprinkle, cattle shed improvement, recharge ponds, rainwater harvesting, wastewater collection, composting, terrace to form and mobilize emergency response taskforce at RMSimulation to emergency response taskforce on emergency response (First aid, search and rescue, relief distribution etc.)Prepare Community
